description_long: This table features a square, amber-tinted glass or acrylic top with rounded corners, supported by four cylindrical legs. The legs have a vertically ribbed texture and appear to be made of a contrasting material, possibly metal or stone, with a light, marbled finish. The tabletop is thick and visually substantial, with a glossy, reflective surface that gives it a modern, high-end appearance. The legs are positioned near the corners, providing stability and a balanced look. The overall design is minimalist yet striking, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as public plazas, upscale parks, or modern office lobbies. There are no visible drawers, handles, or other interactive components, emphasizing its function as a sturdy, decorative surface.
description: A modern square table with a thick, amber-tinted glossy top and four ribbed, marbled cylindrical legs. The design is minimalist and visually striking, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square amber tabletop and two of the ribbed, marbled legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same tabletop and leg arrangement visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the same features and leg positions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tabletop and two legs, similar to the other views.
